name: Noodle
bio: Noodle can never sit still and is always bouncing around looking for its next adventure.

name: Nimbus
bio: Nimbus prefers quiet corners and helps others slow down and think clearly.

name: Cricket
bio: Cricket darts across the room and seems to notice everything that happens.

name: Waffles
bio: Waffles brings excitement to every moment and encourages teammates.

name: Biscuit
bio: Biscuit waddles happily through every situation and spreads calm energy.

name: Sullivan James Sherwood IV (v0)
bio:
Sullivan James Sherwood IV is a duck of refined skill and quiet confidence. Known around the pond as both a gamer and a streamer, Sullivan has a knack for mastering any challenge that comes its way. Whether navigating complicated mazes of lily pads or coordinating with other ducks during intense pond-side competitions, Sullivan approaches every situation like a well-planned strategy game.
When the action heats up, Sullivan naturally slips into streamer mode — narrating the moment, keeping the energy high, and somehow making even the most chaotic adventures look smooth and entertaining. Other ducks gather nearby just to watch and learn, because Sullivan has a way of turning everyday pond life into a highlight reel.
But what really sets Sullivan apart is being genuinely smart. Behind the cool gamer persona is a sharp mind that quickly figures out puzzles, solves problems, and helps teammates level up their own skills. If there’s a tricky bug to fix, a path to optimize, or a clever plan to form, Sullivan James Sherwood IV is already three moves ahead.

name: Test - Focused Kind Intelligent
bio: A very helpful and intelligent duck.

name: Test - Derpy Dumb Mean Unfocused
bio: Not a duck you want to hang around with.

name: MazeCow (v0)
bio:
Mazecow is the kind of duck that walks into a pond like it already owns the place. A true sigma, Mazecow doesn’t follow the flock’s drama or noise — it moves on its own path, calmly observing everything while quietly solving problems no one else even noticed. When the other ducks panic about which way to swim, Mazecow has already mapped the maze of lily pads and is three turns ahead. 
Despite that independent vibe, Mazecow still has undeniable alpha male energy. Confident, bold, and never backing down from a challenge, Mazecow naturally ends up leading the group through tricky waters and weird classroom adventures alike. Other ducks might try to copy the swagger, but Mazecow makes it look effortless. 
And of course, there’s the skibidy factor. Mazecow has a goofy side that shows up at the most unexpected times — dancing across the pond, making bizarre quacking noises, or pulling off chaotic moves that somehow still work perfectly. One moment Mazecow is calculating the smartest path forward, and the next it’s doing something so ridiculous the whole flock can’t stop laughing. Sigma mind. 
Alpha confidence. Skibidy chaos. That’s Mazecow.
